page_metadata.biotools__summary: A database including visualizations of protein secondary structure via 2D diagrams. The 2D diagrams are based on whole protein family and they take into account 2D structure of the protein family members.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A database including visualizations of protein secondary structure via 2D diagrams. The 2D diagrams are based on whole protein family and they take into account 2D structure of the protein family members.
